titleStmt.title: SII 22.156: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 156. (A.R. No. 156 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This is a curious inscription recording the declaration of a lady by name Dēvapperumāḷ calling herself the vēḷaikkāṟi of (a chief) Rājarāja-Malaiyakularāyan alias Nīrēṟṟaperumāḷ Edirigaḷnāyaṉ that she would not survive her master and husband (Edirigaḷnāyaṉ) after his demise and an imprecation on herself and others if she fails in her vow or is prevented by them from keeping up to it.
The writing seems to be of about the 12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Irācarācamalaiyaku(l)la rāyanāṉa nireṟṟaperumāḷāṉa Etirikaḷ nāyanukku
veḷaikkāṟiyāṉa tevapperumāḷeṉ Etirikaḷnāyaṉukkup piṉpu Irunte nākil Eṉ māṟṟāṭṭimāṟku maṇṭaiyu miṭṭu I
varkaḷukku niruṅkuṭuttu Ivarkaḷ kalaccoṟṟaiyum Uṇkiṟeṉ Eṉ miṇāḷaṉ Oṭu Eṉṉaic cāvaveṇṭāmeṉpār Eṉmi
ṇāḷaṉ Eṟukiṟa kutiraikkup pullu Iṭum kāḻican Etirikaḷ nāyaka mutumaiyā ṉukku taṉ miṇāṭṭiyaiyuṅ kuṭuppāṉ nā
n cāvātiruntenākil Eṉṉai neruppil kaṭṭi pukaṭutal kollutalai ceyyātavaṉ taṉ ṉoṭṭaiyāṟku tan miṇāṭṭiyaiyuṅ kuṭuttu Eṉ
miṇāḷaṉ Eṟukiṟa kutiraikku pulliṭukiṟa kāḻicanāṉa Etirikaḷ nāyakamutumai yāṉukku taṉ miṇāṭṭiyai kuṭuppāṉ Eṉṉai kaṇṭāl kollātavaṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
